title: Avalanche Strikes Nagano-Niigata Ski Resort, Four Injured
description: An avalanche struck an advanced-level course at Madarao Kogen Ski Resort, which spans Niigata and Nagano prefectures, on February 28th, leaving four people injured, including two family members. (News On Japan)
content:
Nagano, Mar 01 (News On Japan) -
 An avalanche struck an advanced-level course at Madarao Kogen Ski Resort, which spans Niigata and Nagano prefectures, on February 28th, leaving four people injured,… [+1091 chars]
de: Lawine trifft Skigebiet Nagano-Niigata, vier Verletzte. Am 28. Februar traf eine Lawine einen Fortgeschrittenenkurs im Skigebiet Madarao Kogen, das sich über die Präfekturen Niigata und Nagano erstreckt. Dabei wurden vier Menschen verletzt, darunter zwei Familienmitglieder. (Neuigkeiten über Japan)
en: Avalanche Strikes Nagano-Niigata Ski Resort, Four Injured. An avalanche struck an advanced-level course at Madarao Kogen Ski Resort, which spans Niigata and Nagano prefectures, on February 28th, leaving four people injured, including two family members. (News On Japan)
la: Avalanche Ictus Nagano-Niigata Ski Obstinatus, Quattuor Laesus. (News On Japan)
